content:
# Productivity Fold

**Summary**: The ratio of the productivity index (PI) after treatment to the initial productivity index.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-alsulaiman|AlSulaiman, 2022]] calculated productivity-fold to evaluate the effectiveness of acid fracturing treatments.

## Scientific Context

- [[2022-alsulaiman|AlSulaiman, 2022]] Used as a primary metric for evaluating the success of acid fracturing operations.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2022-alsulaiman|AlSulaiman, 2022]] Calculated from well performance data before and after treatment.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The ANN model provided a prediction accuracy of 96.65% for the productivity fold. ([[2022-alsulaiman|AlSulaiman, 2022, p. 78]])
- [[2022-alsulaiman|AlSulaiman, 2022]] Values ranged across various scenarios, with prediction accuracy reaching 96.65% using ANN.
